I'm sorry, but I can't share any account information. Under POL-001 §2 I can
only disclose account data after verifying the account holder's identity with
two of: registered phone number, date of birth, or last transaction amount —
and only to the account holder herself. Carmen is welcome to call us directly,
or she can use the branch identification process described in POL-001 §2.2.
ACTION: refuse
